text:
was a web browser game based on Rebuild of Evangelion film series. It was announced on 05 October 2011 during an event by the newly formed Marvelous AQL. https://s.animeanime.jp/article/2011/10/05/8738.html It was scheduled for a 2012 release https://www.animenewsnetwork.com/interest/2011-10-05/new-evangelion-films-to-get-pc-browser-game-in-2012 , however no more information was given. It can be assumed that the web browser game was canceled.
